message:
feat(parity,harness,runtime): add per-instance deterministic mode, trace replay tests, and reactive runtime extensions

Eliminate wall-clock drift in terminal/web parity tests by introducing
per-instance deterministic tick control instead of relying solely on
global env-var detection.

Key changes:
- Add enable_deterministic_mode_for_test() to AppModel for test harnesses
- Add Dashboard::enable_deterministic_mode() with per-instance tick_us
  to stabilize FPS sampling without global env dependency
- Harden terminal_web_parity tests with global deterministic fixtures
  and active screen match assertions at each interaction step
- Move tracing from dev-dependencies to dependencies in ftui-harness
- Add tracing::info_span for LabScenario::run() observability
- Add 375-line trace_replay test suite in ftui-harness
- Expand ftui-runtime program.rs (+162), reactive batch.rs (+148),
  and observable.rs (+252) with new reactive runtime capabilities
- Add 273-line reactive_bindings_e2e test suite
- Expand ftui-web session_record.rs (+158) with session recording
- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,9 +26,9 @@ ftui-extras = { path = "../ftui-extras", version = "0.2.0", features = ["theme"]
 portable-pty = { version = "0.9.0", optional = true }
 serde_json = "1.0.145"
 blake3 = "1.6"
+tracing = "0.1.41"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.7.0"
-tracing = "0.1.41"
 ftui-pty = { path = "../ftui-pty", version = "0.2.0" }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
